title: Arattupuzha Temple
tagline: Arattupuzha Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Arattupuzha Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Arattupuzha in Thrissur district of Kerala in India, administered by Cochin Devaswom Board.
overview.description: The Arattupuzha Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Arattupuzha in Thrissur district of Kerala in India, administered by Cochin Devaswom Board.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Peruvanam Pooram
topPlaces.description: Peruvanam Pooram is one of the most popular temple festivals of the South Indian state of Kerala. It is held at Peruvanam Temple in Cherpu, Thrissur District.

topPlaces.name: Arattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Arattupuzha is a cultural village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, South India, approximately 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) south of the town of Thrissur. Located on the banks of the Karuvannur river, Arattupuzha is home to the annual Arattupuzha Pooram that stages the grand spectacle of numerous caparisoned elephants lined up in a row to the accompaniment of ethnic percussion concerts.

topPlaces.name: Vallachira
topPlaces.description: Vallachira is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Thottipal Bhagavati Temple
topPlaces.description: Thottipal Bhagavati Temple is a Bhagavathi temple located in Thrissur District of Kerala state. It is one of the 108 Devi temples installed by Parashurama.

topPlaces.name: Urakam, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Urakam or Oorakam is a neighbourhood near Cherpu in Thrissur of Kerala state in the peninsular India.

topPlaces.name: Thottippal
topPlaces.description: Thottippal is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a part of Parappukkara Grama Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Cheruval
topPlaces.description: Cheruval is a village in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. The main festivals of this village are the football tournament and "Desavilakku".

topPlaces.name: Chathakudam
topPlaces.description: Chathakudam is a village in Thrissur district, Kerala, India.

items.note: Peruvanam Pooram is one of the most popular temple festivals of the South Indian state of Kerala. It is held at Peruvanam Temple in Cherpu, Thrissur District.

Arattupuzha is a cultural village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, South India, approximately 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) south of the town of Thrissur. Located on the banks of the Karuvannur river, Arattupuzha is home to the annual Arattupuzha Pooram that stages the grand spectacle of numerous caparisoned elephants lined up in a row to the accompaniment of ethnic percussion concerts.
Vallachira is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Thottipal Bhagavati Temple is a Bhagavathi temple located in Thrissur District of Kerala state. It is one of the 108 Devi temples installed by Parashurama.
Urakam or Oorakam is a neighbourhood near Cherpu in Thrissur of Kerala state in the peninsular India.
Thottippal is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a part of Parappukkara Grama Panchayat.
Cheruval is a village in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. The main festivals of this village are the football tournament and "Desavilakku".
Chathakudam is a village in Thrissur district, Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Arattupuzha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Arattupuzha Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Arattupuzha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Arattupuzha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Arattupuzha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Arattupuzha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Arattupuzha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Arattupuzha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Peruvanam Pooram, Arattupuzha, Vallachira, Thottipal Bhagavati Temple, Urakam, Thrissur.
